message: Sarah from the platform team said the API gateway migration is happening next Thursday.
Marcus owns the auth service. If anything auth-related breaks, he's the contact.
The deploy freeze starts December 15th and ends January 3rd.
Our SLA with Acme Corp requires 99.95% uptime on the notification API.
Actually the SLA is 99.9%, not 99.95%. I was thinking of the old contract.
James from security said we need to rotate all service account keys by end of month.
The new monitoring stack is Grafana + Mimir. We're migrating off Datadog.
Who's responsible for the auth service?
The on-call rotation this week is: Mon-Wed Sarah, Thu-Fri Marcus, Weekend me.
